heading: Procurement of detection equipment for United States border security
label: 2331 Procurement of detection equipment for United States border security

children.text: equipment capable of detecting the movement of weapons of mass destruction and related materials into the United States;
equipment capable of interdicting the movement of weapons of mass destruction and related materials into the United States; and
materials and technologies related to use of equipment described in paragraph (1) or (2).
